command.generateCommit.title: Generate Commit Message
command.stopGeneration.title: Stop Generation
command.selectAvailableModel.title: Select Available Model
command.showTokenStats.title: Show Token Usage Statistics
command.resetTokenStats.title: Reset Token Usage Statistics
configuration.service.apiKey.description:
API key for authentication with your AI service provider. [View Token Usage](command:commit-message-generator.showTokenStats)

eg: sk-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
configuration.service.baseURL.descriptio:
Base URL of the AI service API endpoint.

eg: https://api.deepseek.com
configuration.service.model.description: AI model for generating commit messages. [Browse all available models](command:commit-message-generator.selectAvailableModel)
configuration.commit.autoStage.descripti: Automatically stage all changes (git add .) before generating messages.
configuration.commit.template.descriptio:
Custom template for the commit message. If empty, the default [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format will be used.

eg: {type}({scope}): {subject}
configuration.commit.customPrompt.descri:
Additional generation instructions for custom commit conventions or constraints.

eg: enforce Jira ticket numbers, use specific format, follow team conventions
